headlines.title: Secretive Azerbaijan Deal Raises Energy Security Concerns in Georgia
headlines.summary: Recently signed deals between Georgia and Azerbaijan are raising fresh questions about Tbilisi’s strategic direction and energy security. headlines.title: Philippines Receives First Iranian Crude Cargo Since Hormuz Blockade
headlines.summary: The Philippines has received its first cargo of Iranian crude, Reuters reported on Friday, citing tanker-tracking data from Kpler and Vortexa. headlines.title: Japan Crude Imports Fell 66% in April
headlines.summary: Amid the supply disruption in the Middle East, Japan’s crude oil imports crashed by 66% in April from the same month last year, official Japanese data showed on Friday. headlines.summary: Early on Friday, oil prices were on track to plunge by 19% in May as traders and speculators bet on an extended ceasefire and an eventual U.S.-Iran deal despite the biggest physical supply disruption in history.
